messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0000",
  "title": "01 中国移动游戏市场现状分析",
  "page_index": 4,
  "page_range": "4"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0001",
    "title": "4中国移动游戏市场收入规模",
    "page_range": "4-5",
    "summary": "This section details the 2025 revenue scale of China's mobile game market and establishes the methodological standards for all related financial metrics in the report. It answers retrieval queries regarding:
• **Topics & Claims:** The 2025 market revenue scale and the industry sentiment shift from "recovery anxiety" to "strategic dormancy."
• **Definitions & Scope:** Defines the "China mobile game market" as titles launched on mobile platforms in mainland China only, explicitly excluding PC, console, and other hardware versions. Defines "revenue scale" strictly as total user consumption, excluding ad monetization and third-party top-ups. This standard applies to all subsequent "China revenue" statistics in the report.
• **Procedures & Evidence Types:** Revenue figures are calculated using DianDian's statistical model, synthesized from three evidence sources: DianDian platform data, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews.
• **Dates & Entities:** Covers the 2025 reporting period, with a 2026 publication copyright. Notes that data may be adjusted in DianDian's 2026 reports. Key entities include DianDian Data and mainland China mobile game publishers.
• **Metrics & Visuals:** Reports the total user consumption revenue metric for 2025, corresponding to a chart/figure titled "2025年中国移动游戏市场收入规模" located on pages 4-5."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0002",
    "title": "5中国移动游戏市场收入集中度",
    "page_range": "5-6",
    "summary": "This section supports retrieval for queries regarding revenue concentration, market structure, and developer strategies in China's mobile gaming ecosystem (App Store only) from 2023 to 2025.

**Topics:** Mobile gaming market revenue concentration, top-tier vs. long-tail competition dynamics, niche/indie game market strategies, user retention and lifecycle management.
**Entities:** China mobile gaming market, App Store, revenue rank tiers (1-10, 11-50, 51-200, others), data provider (点点数据/DianDian), specific indie titles (《苏丹的游戏》《情感反诈模拟器》《逃离鸭科夫》).
**Dates/Timeframe:** 2023, 2024, 2025 (data years); 2026 (report copyright).
**Claims & Analysis:** The top 10 games absorb nearly half the market, severely narrowing growth windows for new or mid-tier titles. Competition has polarized into giants defending market share and long-tail developers fighting for survival. Top products prioritize extending lifecycle and maintaining user activity at all costs. Smaller developers succeed by targeting unmet vertical/niche demands, leveraging specific player community needs rather than competing on scale.
**Metrics & Data Points (App Store Revenue Share by Tier):** 
- 1-10 rank: 43.14% (2023), 43.23% (2024), 44.01% (2025)
- 11-50 rank: 26.62% (2023), 28.68% (2024), 27.20% (2025)
- 51-200 rank: 19.45% (2023), 18.62% (2024), 19.08% (2025)
- Others: 10.79% (2023), 9.47% (2024), 9.71% (2025)
**Figures/Tables:** Chart titled "2023-2025年中国移动游戏市场收入集中度（仅App Store）" displaying stacked annual revenue distribution across the four rank tiers.
**Evidence Types:** Proprietary quantitative market research data, industry trend analysis, qualitative case examples of breakout indie games.
**Answerable Questions:** What is the revenue concentration trend for China's mobile gaming market on the App Store (..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0003",
    "title": "6中国移动游戏市场用户规模",
    "page_range": "6-7",
    "summary": "This section supports retrieval for questions regarding:
- **Topics:** China mobile game market user scale, female gamer demographic growth, mobile internet penetration trends, and the impact of lightweight/casual gameplay on user acquisition.
- **Entities:** China Internet Network Information Center (CNNIC), DianDian Data (点点数据), female mobile gamers, and specific female-oriented titles (《恋与深空》《光与夜之恋》《世界之外》).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Biannual data points from Dec 2021 to Jun 2025; specific benchmarks for Jun 2025 and Dec 2024; notes potential data adjustments in 2026 DianDian reports.
- **Metrics & Data Points:** Mobile internet user volume (10.29–11.16亿), month-on-month growth rates (0.46%–1.75%), female gamer share in online games (48.0% as of Jun 2025, +3.1 percentage points from Dec 2024).
- **Claims & Insights:** Female players are rapidly increasing and have become a core demographic in mobile gaming; this growth is driven by dedicated female-oriented titles and the broader industry shift toward lightweight gameplay; overall mobile internet user base maintains stable, steady growth.
- **Evidence Sources & Methodology:** Official statistics from CNNIC’s 56th Statistical Report on Internet Development; mobile game user penetration calculated via DianDian’s proprietary statistical model, which integrates platform data, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews.
- **Definitions & Scope Notes:** “China game user scale” explicitly covers mainland China totals; data is subject to potential revision in future 2026 DianDian reports.
- **Referenced Tables/Figures:** Time-series chart/table displaying China mobile internet user counts (in 100M) and corresponding month-on-month growth rates (Dec 2021–Jun 2025); reference to a 2025 internet device distribution brea..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0004",
    "title": "7中国移动游戏市场用户设备特点",
    "page_range": "7-8",
    "summary": "This section addresses the hardware characteristics of users in the Chinese mobile gaming market, enabling retrieval for queries on device preferences, demographics, and lifecycle trends. It answers questions regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** iOS/Apple dominance in the high-end mobile gaming segment; devices launched 3–5 years ago comprise nearly 60% of the user base.
- **Entities:** Game genres (FPS, MOBA, Casual representatives), operating systems (iOS, Android, Other), smartphone brands (OPPO, vivo, Huawei, Honor), and research source (DianDian).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** 2025 (benchmark year for download rankings and volume thresholds), 2026 (report copyright), and device age categories (0–2 years to 6+ years).
- **Figures & Metrics:** Four percentage-based bar charts comparing device OS, top brands, price tiers (1–2K, 2–3K, 3–5K, Other), and release timelines across the three game genres. Metrics are expressed as percentages (0%–60%).
- **Evidence & Constraints:** Proprietary research by DianDian. Data is filtered to three representative titles that ranked in the 2025 TOP 10 downloads and exceeded 80 million annual downloads in 2025.
- **Retrieval Scope:** Supports queries on mobile gamer hardware preferences, genre-specific device demographics, smartphone market share by price/brand in gaming, and device upgrade/lifecycle patterns in China."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0005",
    "title": "8中国游戏版号发布情况",
    "page_range": "8-9",
    "summary": "This section addresses retrieval queries regarding Chinese video game license (版号) issuance trends and market dynamics from 2023 to 2025. It can answer questions about:
- **Topics:** Annual license supply growth, cross-platform (Mobile + PC) development strategies, and predicted industry capacity clearing driven by commercial ROI.
- **Entities:** National Press and Publication Administration (official data source), Chinese game developers/publishers, mobile and PC gaming platforms.
- **Dates:** 2023, 2024, 2025 (historical issuance data), and a 1–2 year forward-looking market projection.
- **Definitions/Methodology:** Clarifies that platform-specific license totals may exceed the total number of approved games because a single title can receive approvals for multiple platforms.
- **Claims:** Highlights a sharp contrast between rising license volumes and near-zero market revenue growth/declining mobile revenue share, predicting a market-driven consolidation phase. Asserts that multi-platform licensing is becoming a standard for major titles to leverage PC advantages (gameplay depth, graphics, monetization habits) and escape mobile homogeneity.
- **Metrics:** 2025 total licenses (1,771); dual Mobile+PC approvals (118 in 2025, up from 57 in 2023 and 86 in 2024); yearly breakdowns of total, mobile, and PC license counts.
- **Tables/Figures:** Contains three comparative data summaries/charts for 2023–2025 detailing license distributions across Overall, Domestic, and Imported categories by platform.
- **Evidence Types:** Official government issuance statistics, comparative yearly datasets, and industry market analysis."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0006",
    "title": "9中国移动游戏收入TOP榜",
    "page_range": "9-10",
    "summary": "本章节可支持以下维度的检索与问答：
- **主题**：中国移动游戏市场收入排名、App Store渠道流水表现、非头部厂商竞争策略、细分赛道创新趋势与市场格局。
- **实体**：TOP15游戏产品（如王者荣耀、和平精英、无尽冬日、三角洲行动、原神、恋与深空等）；研发/发行厂商（腾讯、网易、米哈游、叠纸游戏、点点互动、海南畅梦科技、途游游戏等）；数据机构（点点数据）。
- **日期**：2024年榜单统计周期、2025年榜单及流水预估周期、文档版权年份（2026）。
- **核心声明/观点**：非头部厂商的唯一生存路径是在极度细分赛道中实现精准定位与创新；2025年新入围的4款游戏通过满足特定用户群体未充分满足的核心需求，并在玩法融合或题材表现上建立差异化壁垒；此类创新象征市场“毛细血管”仍具活力，但难以驱动大盘增长，仅为巨头主导格局下的补充。
- **表格与指标**：包含两份榜单。表1为“2025年中国移动游戏收入TOP榜（仅App Store）”，字段含排名、游戏名、厂商、2025年流水预估（单位：亿元，数值区间13.73-172.34）；表2为“2024年TOP15游戏名单”，仅含排名与游戏名。
- **证据类型与数据来源**：定量指标基于点点数据统计模型核算；数据交叉验证与支撑材料来源于企业财报与专家访谈。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0007",
    "title": "10中国移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜",
    "page_range": "10-11",
    "summary": "This section provides a quarterly (Q1–Q4) ranking of top-grossing new mobile games in China for 2025, enabling retrieval for:
- **Topics & Entities:** 2025 Chinese mobile game market performance, specific game titles (e.g., 燕云十六声, 无畏契约：源能行动, 斗罗大陆：猎魂世界), genre classifications, and developer tiers (large vs. small/mid studios).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Revenue and reception data segmented by 2025 quarters (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4).
- **Metrics:** iOS App Store revenue (in 亿元), player ratings, and uncontextualized percentage values (15.3%, 84.7%, 18.9%, 81.1%, 7.5%, 92.5%) likely indicating market share or revenue distribution.
- **Claims:** Major studios continue to lead revenue charts despite a sharp decline in release volume, while small and mid-sized studios attempt to break through via niche/edge innovations.
- **Evidence & Scope:** Data sourced from DianDian Data (点点数据) self-research, strictly limited to iOS App Store new releases for 2025.
- **Answerable Questions:** Which new games led iOS revenue in each 2025 quarter? What are the exact revenue figures and player ratings for specific 2025 releases? How do large vs. small studios compare in output and market positioning? What genres dominated new releases in 2025?"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0008",
    "title": "11中国移动游戏市场新品收入占比",
    "page_range": "11-12",
    "summary": "**Topics:** Chinese mobile game market new product revenue share, market performance trends (2023–2025), game development & publishing strategies, user consumption behavior, capital market expectations for new titles.
**Key Metrics & Dates:** 2023–2025 timeframe; App Store-only data; 2025 new game revenue share dropped sharply from 18.9% to 7.3%.
**Entities:** Data source: DianDian (点点数据). Platform: App Store. Annual TOP5 new games: 2023 (逆水寒, 崩坏：星穹铁道, 冒险岛：枫之传说, 合金弹头：觉醒, 晶核); 2024 (地下城与勇士：起源, 无尽冬日, 三国：谋定天下, 向僵尸开炮, 恋与深空); 2025 (燕云十六声, 英雄没有闪, 杖剑传说, 永远的蔚蓝星球, 无畏契约：源能行动).
**Claims & Analysis:** The revenue contraction is attributed to the absence of head/super products, which may lead capital markets to lower short-term growth expectations for new games. High R&D and marketing costs force developers toward conservative, formula-based project planning rather than exploratory innovation. User fatigue with standardized content reduces willingness to pay for non-disruptive titles. Mid-tier games collectively underperform due to an inability to match top-tier quality or offer creative scarcity in a competitive traffic environment.
**Definitions & Concepts:** “确定性创新” (Deterministic Innovation): A validated success strategy for new games that relies on mature PC IP ports, proven genre fusions, or dominant vertical category positioning.
**Evidence & Data Types:** Proprietary research chart tracking 2023–2025 revenue share trends; annual ranked lists of TOP5 new games; analytical commentary on market dynamics, developer behavior, and user preferences; source attribution to DianDian independent research."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0009",
    "title": "12中国移动游戏下载量TOP榜",
    "page_range": "12-13",
    "summary": "**Topics:** China mobile game market performance, annual download rankings (iOS App Store only), publisher market positioning, game genre adaptation analysis.
**Entities:** 
- Games: 《三角洲行动》《王者荣耀》《和平精英》《开心消消乐》《无畏契约：源能行动》《蛋仔派对》《地下城与勇士：起源》《金铲铲之战》《我的世界：移动版》《燕云十六声》《地铁跑酷》《超自然行动组》《贪吃蛇大作战®》《腾讯欢乐斗地主》《迷你世界》《第五人格》《欢乐钓鱼大师》《颜色大作战》《元梦之星》《永劫无间》
- Publishers/Developers: 腾讯、网易、乐元素、创梦天地、巨人网络、微派网络、迷你玩
- Data Source: 点点数据（DianDian）
**Dates:** 2025 (primary ranking year), 2024 (comparative year), January–October (partial monthly breakdown).
**Definitions & Methodology:** Download figures are estimated annual totals restricted to the iOS App Store. Data is synthesized from DianDian tracking, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews, then calculated using DianDian’s proprietary statistical model.
**Claims & Insights:** 
- 《三角洲行动》 secured the #1 annual download rank despite a primarily PC-focused user base, demonstrating effective mobile experience redesign.
- 《超自然行动组》 facilitated Giant Network’s return to the top 15, validating the publisher’s expertise in low-barrier, real-time social competitive gameplay.
**Tables & Metrics:** 
- Table 1: 2025 China Mobile Game Download TOP 15 (App Store). Columns: Rank, Game Name, Publisher, Estimated Downloads (万次). Top 3 metrics: 三角洲行动 (6104.8万), 王者荣耀 (4634.8万), 和平精英 (3371.2万).
- Table 2: 2024 TOP 15 ranking list with partial monthly data points (Jan–Oct) for year-over-year comparison.
**Evidence Types:** Quantitative download estimates, ranked performance lists, publisher attribution, multi-source data triangulation (tracking models + financial disclosures + expert input), qualitative market analysis on gameplay adaptation and publisher strategy."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0010",
    "title": "13中国游戏行业投融资相关事件",
    "page_range": "13",
    "summary": "Topics: China gaming industry investment and financing trends, market consolidation, capital strategy shifts, and the impact of technological/gameplay paradigm cycles on venture funding.
Entities: GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈 (data provider), 点点数据 (industry analyst), AI+游戏, 互动影游, 捉宠+种田, 合成+SLG, VR/AR hardware.
Dates: 2023–2025 industry trend comparison; data collection cutoff November 2025; three-year window for new company formation statistics.
Definitions & Procedures: Investment events are tracked based on equity change dates; scope limited to publicly disclosed financing events; "multiple investors" defined as entities making two or more investments within the calendar year.
Claims: The absence of dominant hot tracks in 2025 caused sharp declines in both funding events and new studio formation; the market is in a bubble-clearing, fundamentals-focused transition; capital has shifted to defensive, foundational, and dispersed investments while awaiting the next major tech or content breakthrough (e.g., AI-generated dynamic worlds, mature VR/AR, novel social gameplay).
Metrics: Investment events down 24% YoY; new gaming companies down 54% YoY; new companies over three years: 110, 85, 39; total recorded events: 142; multiple investors account for 38% of annual activity; equity changes breakdown: 102 new holdings, 13 continued holdings, 27 exits.
Tables & Figures: 2025 China gaming industry investment event data summary; monthly investment event volume chart; investor frequency distribution; equity change category breakdown.
Evidence Types: Publicly tracked transaction data, equity registry records, YoY comparative statistics, industry analyst commentary, and dataset scope documentation (4,012 companies tracked).
Retrieval Focus: Answers questions regarding 2025 gaming sector funding..."
  }
]

message.content:
This parent section provides a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of the current status of China's mobile gaming market, synthesizing financial, demographic, regulatory, and capital trends to support retrieval across multiple analytical dimensions.

**Topics & Scope:** Covers 2025 market revenue scale, revenue concentration dynamics, user scale & demographic shifts (notably female gamers), hardware/device characteristics, game license (版号) issuance trends, annual/quarterly revenue & download rankings, new product revenue share, and industry investment/financing activity. The analytical scope is strictly confined to mainland China mobile platforms, explicitly excluding PC/console versions, ad monetization, and third-party top-ups from core revenue calculations.

**Entities & Dates:** Primary reporting period is 2025, with historical comparisons spanning 2023–2024 and biannual benchmarks from Dec 2021 to Jun 2025. Key entities include data providers (DianDian Data/点点数据, CNNIC, GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈), regulatory bodies (National Press and Publication Administration), major publishers/developers (Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Papergames, Giant Network, etc.), and flagship titles (e.g., 王者荣耀, 和平精英, 燕云十六声, 恋与深空, 三角洲行动). The document carries a 2026 copyright, with explicit notes that proprietary metrics may be adjusted in future DianDian reports.

**Definitions & Procedures:** Defines "revenue scale" strictly as total user consumption. Clarifies that platform-specific license totals may exceed the number of approved games due to multi-platform approvals for single titles. Introduces "确定性创新" (Deterministic Innovation) as a validated development strategy relying on mature PC IP ports, proven genre fusions, or dominant vertical positioning. Data synthesis follows DianDian’s proprietary statistical model, triangulating platform tracking data, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews. Investment tracking is procedurally bound to publicly disclosed equity change dates.

**Claims & Insights:** Industry sentiment has transitioned from "recovery anxiety" to "strategic dormancy." Market structure is highly polarized: the top 10 games absorb ~44% of revenue, narrowing growth windows for mid-tier titles and forcing non-head developers into niche, community-driven survival strategies. Female gamers now constitute 48.0% of the user base, accelerated by lightweight gameplay and dedicated female-oriented titles. iOS dominates high-end segments, while devices aged 3–5 years comprise nearly 60% of the active base. Despite rising license volumes, stagnant overall revenue and a sharp contraction in new game revenue share (from 18.9% to 7.3%) signal a market-driven consolidation phase. Capital activity reflects a bubble-clearing transition, with funding shifting toward defensive, fundamentals-focused investments while awaiting the next technological or content paradigm shift (e.g., AI-generated worlds, mature VR/AR).

**Metrics & Visuals (Tables/Figures):** Key quantitative benchmarks include App Store revenue concentration by tier (1-10 rank: 44.01% in 2025), mobile internet user volume (10.29–11.16亿), 2025 total licenses (1,771) with 118 dual Mobile+PC approvals, TOP 15 revenue range (13.73–172.34 亿元), and TOP 3 annual downloads (三角洲行动: 6104.8万, 王者荣耀: 4634.8万, 和平精英: 3371.2万). Visual assets include: stacked bar charts for 2023–2025 revenue concentration; time-series tables for mobile internet user growth; percentage-based bar charts for device OS, brand, price tier, and age distribution; comparative license issuance summaries; ranked tables for 2024/2025 revenue and download TOP 15; quarterly new game revenue rankings; trend charts for new product revenue share; and investment event volume/frequency breakdowns.

**Evidence Types:** Integrates proprietary quantitative market research, official government statistics (CNNIC internet reports, NPPA license data), corporate financial disclosures, expert interviews, public equity/transaction registries, and qualitative industry trend analysis.
message.reasoning_content:
Here's a thinking process:

1.  **Analyze User Input:**
    - **Task:** Create a retrieval-oriented summary for a parent section of a document.
    - **Input Data:**
        - Parent: `{"node_id": "0000", "title": "01 中国移动游戏市场现状分析", "page_index": 4, "page_range": "4"}`
        - Child summaries: 10 summaries (node_ids 0001 to 0010) covering various aspects of the Chinese mobile gaming market in 2025 (revenue scale, concentration, user scale, device characteristics, license issuance, revenue TOP lists, new product revenue TOP, new product revenue share, download TOP, investment/financing).
    - **Constraints:**
        - Use the child summaries.
        - Mention topics, entities, dates, tables, figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types when visible.
        - Do not invent facts.
        - Return *only* the summary text.
        - Retrieval-oriented format.

2.  **Deconstruct Child Summaries (Mental Mapping & Extraction):**
    I need to synthesize the key elements from all 10 child summaries into a cohesive parent-level summary. I'll extract the required categories systematically.

    *Topics:* Market revenue scale & methodology, revenue concentration & market structure, user scale & demographics (female gamers, mobile internet penetration), user device characteristics (OS, brands, price, age), game license (版号) issuance trends, revenue rankings (TOP 15), new product revenue rankings & share, download rankings, industry investment/financing trends.
    *Entities:* DianDian Data (点点数据), CNNIC, National Press and Publication Administration, GAMESHARK, major publishers (Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Papergames, etc.), specific game titles (王者荣耀, 和平精英, 燕云十六声, 恋与深空, etc.), iOS App Store, mainland China market.
    *Dates:* Primary focus on 2025, with historical comparisons from 2023-2024, biannual data from Dec 2021-Jun 2025, forward-looking 1-2 year projections, 2026 report copyright.
    *Tables/Figures:* Charts/tables for 2025 revenue scale, 2023-2025 revenue concentration (stacked), mobile internet user growth (time-series), device OS/brand/price/age bar charts, 2023-2025 license distribution charts, 2024/2025 revenue TOP lists, 2025 quarterly new game revenue rankings, 2023-2025 new product revenue share trends, 2024/2025 download TOP lists, 2025 investment event summaries/charts.
    *Definitions/Scope:* "China mobile game market" = mainland China mobile-only titles, excludes PC/console. "Revenue scale" = total user consumption, excludes ads/third-party top-ups. "China game user scale" = mainland totals. License counts may exceed game counts due to multi-platform approvals. "Deterministic Innovation" = mature IP ports/proven genre fusions. Investment tracking based on equity change dates.
    *Procedures/Methodology:* DianDian's proprietary statistical model synthesizes platform data, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews. CNNIC official stats used for internet penetration. Investment data from public equity changes.
    *Claims:* Market sentiment shifted from "recovery anxiety" to "strategic dormancy." Top 10 games absorb ~44% of revenue, polarizing competition. Female gamers are a core, growing demographic (48% share). iOS dominates high-end; 3-5 year old devices make up ~60% of base. Rising license volumes contrast with stagnant revenue, predicting consolidation. Multi-platform licensing is standardizing. Non-head developers must target niches. New game revenue share dropped sharply (18.9% to 7.3%) due to lack of super hits and high costs. Investment events and new studios declined sharply (24% and 54% YoY), indicating a bubble-clearing phase awaiting next tech/content breakthrough.
    *Metrics:* 2025 revenue scale (total user consumption). Revenue concentration tiers (1-10: ~44%, 11-50: ~27%, etc.). Mobile internet users: 10.29-11.16亿. Female gamer share: 48.0% (Jun 2025). 2025 licenses: 1,771 total, 118 dual Mobile+PC. Revenue TOP 15 range: 13.73-172.34 亿元. New game revenue share: 7.3% (2025). Download TOP 3: 三角洲行动 (6104.8万), 王者荣耀 (4634.8万), 和平精英 (3371.2万). Investment: 142 events, down 24% YoY; new companies down 54% YoY.
    *Evidence Types:* Proprietary quantitative market research, official government statistics (CNNIC, NPPA), corporate financial reports, expert interviews, public equity/transaction records, industry trend analysis, qualitative case studies.

3.  **Synthesize into Retrieval-Oriented Summary:**
    I will structure the summary to explicitly cover the requested categories, ensuring it's optimized for retrieval (clear, structured, comprehensive but concise). I'll follow a logical flow matching the parent title "01 中国移动游戏市场现状分析" (Analysis of the Current Status of China's Mobile Game Market).

    *Structure:*
    - Overview/Scope & Topics
    - Key Entities & Dates
    - Definitions & Methodology/Procedures
    - Core Claims & Insights
    - Metrics & Data Points
    - Tables, Figures & Evidence Types
    - Retrieval Focus

    *Draft Generation (Mental Refinement):*
    This parent section provides a comprehensive analysis of the current status of China's mobile gaming market, synthesizing data on revenue scale, market concentration, user demographics, device characteristics, regulatory licensing, product rankings, and investment trends. It supports retrieval for queries spanning:
    **Topics & Scope:** 2025 market revenue scale, revenue concentration dynamics, user scale & female demographic growth, hardware/device preferences, game license (版号) issuance trends, annual/quarterly revenue & download rankings, new product revenue share, and industry investment/financing activity. The scope is strictly limited to mainland China mobile platforms, explicitly excluding PC, console, and ad monetization/third-party top-ups from revenue calculations.
    **Entities & Dates:** Primary focus on the 2025 reporting period, with historical comparisons from 2023–2024 and biannual benchmarks from Dec 2021 to Jun 2025. Key entities include DianDian Data (点点数据), CNNIC, National Press and Publication Administration, GAMESHARK, major publishers (Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, etc.), and specific titles (e.g., 王者荣耀, 燕云十六声, 恋与深空, 三角洲行动). The report carries a 2026 copyright, with notes on potential future data adjustments.
    **Definitions & Procedures:** Defines "revenue scale" as total user consumption. Clarifies that license totals may exceed approved game counts due to multi-platform approvals. Introduces "确定性创新" (Deterministic Innovation) as a validated strategy relying on mature IP ports or proven genre fusions.     *Definitions/Scope:* "China mobile game market" = mainland China mobile-only titles, excludes PC/console. "Revenue scale" = total user consumption, excludes ads/third-party top-ups. "China game user scale" = mainland totals. License counts may exceed game counts due to multi-platform approvals. "Deterministic Innovation" = mature IP ports/proven genre fusions. Investment tracking based on equity change dates.

Female gamers are a core, growing demographic (48% share). iOS dominates high-end; 3-5 year old devices make up ~60% of base. Rising license volumes contrast with stagnant revenue, predicting consolidation. Multi-platform licensing is standardizing. Non-head developers must target niches. New game revenue share dropped sharply (18.9% to 7.3%) due to lack of super hits and high costs. Investment events and new studios declined sharply (24% and 54% YoY), indicating a bubble-clearing phase awaiting next tech/content breakthrough.
    *Metrics:* 2025 revenue scale (total user consumption). Revenue concentration tiers (1-10: ~44%, 11-50: ~27%, etc.). Mobile internet users: 10.29-11.16亿. Female gamer share: 48.0% (Jun 2025). 2025 licenses: 1,771 total, 118 dual Mobile+PC. Revenue TOP 15 range: 13.73-172.34 亿元. New game revenue share: 7.3% (2025). Download TOP 3: 三角洲行动 (6104.8万), 王者荣耀 (4634.8万), 和平精英 (3371.2万). Investment: 142 events, down 24% YoY; new companies down 54% YoY.

response_text:
This parent section provides a comprehensive, data-driven analysis of the current status of China's mobile gaming market, synthesizing financial, demographic, regulatory, and capital trends to support retrieval across multiple analytical dimensions.

**Topics & Scope:** Covers 2025 market revenue scale, revenue concentration dynamics, user scale & demographic shifts (notably female gamers), hardware/device characteristics, game license (版号) issuance trends, annual/quarterly revenue & download rankings, new product revenue share, and industry investment/financing activity. The analytical scope is strictly confined to mainland China mobile platforms, explicitly excluding PC/console versions, ad monetization, and third-party top-ups from core revenue calculations.

**Entities & Dates:** Primary reporting period is 2025, with historical comparisons spanning 2023–2024 and biannual benchmarks from Dec 2021 to Jun 2025. Key entities include data providers (DianDian Data/点点数据, CNNIC, GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈), regulatory bodies (National Press and Publication Administration), major publishers/developers (Tencent, NetEase, miHoYo, Papergames, Giant Network, etc.), and flagship titles (e.g., 王者荣耀, 和平精英, 燕云十六声, 恋与深空, 三角洲行动). The document carries a 2026 copyright, with explicit notes that proprietary metrics may be adjusted in future DianDian reports.

**Definitions & Procedures:** Defines "revenue scale" strictly as total user consumption. Clarifies that platform-specific license totals may exceed the number of approved games due to multi-platform approvals for single titles. Introduces "确定性创新" (Deterministic Innovation) as a validated development strategy relying on mature PC IP ports, proven genre fusions, or dominant vertical positioning. Data synthesis follows DianDian’s proprietary statistical model, triangulating platform tracking data, corporate financial reports, and expert interviews. Investment tracking is procedurally bound to publicly disclosed equity change dates.

**Claims & Insights:** Industry sentiment has transitioned from "recovery anxiety" to "strategic dormancy." Market structure is highly polarized: the top 10 games absorb ~44% of revenue, narrowing growth windows for mid-tier titles and forcing non-head developers into niche, community-driven survival strategies. Female gamers now constitute 48.0% of the user base, accelerated by lightweight gameplay and dedicated female-oriented titles. iOS dominates high-end segments, while devices aged 3–5 years comprise nearly 60% of the active base. Despite rising license volumes, stagnant overall revenue and a sharp contraction in new game revenue share (from 18.9% to 7.3%) signal a market-driven consolidation phase. Capital activity reflects a bubble-clearing transition, with funding shifting toward defensive, fundamentals-focused investments while awaiting the next technological or content paradigm shift (e.g., AI-generated worlds, mature VR/AR).

**Metrics & Visuals (Tables/Figures):** Key quantitative benchmarks include App Store revenue concentration by tier (1-10 rank: 44.01% in 2025), mobile internet user volume (10.29–11.16亿), 2025 total licenses (1,771) with 118 dual Mobile+PC approvals, TOP 15 revenue range (13.73–172.34 亿元), and TOP 3 annual downloads (三角洲行动: 6104.8万, 王者荣耀: 4634.8万, 和平精英: 3371.2万). Visual assets include: stacked bar charts for 2023–2025 revenue concentration; time-series tables for mobile internet user growth; percentage-based bar charts for device OS, brand, price tier, and age distribution; comparative license issuance summaries; ranked tables for 2024/2025 revenue and download TOP 15; quarterly new game revenue rankings; trend charts for new product revenue share; and investment event volume/frequency breakdowns.

**Evidence Types:** Integrates proprietary quantitative market research, official government statistics (CNNIC internet reports, NPPA license data), corporate financial disclosures, expert interviews, public equity/transaction registries, and qualitative industry trend analysis.
